title: Laravel: job.processed
description: A queue job completed processing. Emitted by JobProcessed.

hasFailed.description: Whether the job was marked as failed.

isReleased.description: Whether the job was released back to the queue.

isDeleted.description: Whether the job was deleted from the queue.

maxExceptions.description: Maximum exceptions before the job is failed.

retryUntil.description: Timestamp after which the job should not be retried.

duration.description: Duration in microseconds. The client emits a string with ms suffix (e.g. "5.123ms"); the ingestion pipeline converts it to microseconds.

requestId.description: Request ID from the X-Request-Id or Request-Id header, or a generated UUID. Set by AssignRequestId middleware into Laravel's shared log context.

request_id.description: Alias — same value as requestId, present if set via event context.
